content.json:
## Windows Extensions Monitor
Track extension deployment status across Arc-enabled Windows servers and Azure VMs. Select up to 4 extensions to compare.

parameters.name: WinExtServerStatus
parameters.label: Server Status
parameters.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines' or type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend ServerStatus = iff(type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', tostring(properties.status), tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.displayStatus))
| distinct ServerStatus

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions' or type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/extensions'
| extend ExtensionName = tostring(properties.type)
| distinct ExtensionName
| where ExtensionName !contains 'Linux'

resources
| where type in ({WinExtMachineType})
| extend JoinID = toupper(id), OSType = iff(type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', tostring(properties.osType), tolower(tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType))), ServerStatus = iff(type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', tostring(properties.status), tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.displayStatus))
| where ServerStatus in ({WinExtServerStatus})
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions' or type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/extensions'
    | where properties.type in ('{WinExtension1:value}')
    | extend VMId = toupper(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions'))), ExtensionName = tostring(properties.type), Status = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
) on $left.JoinID == $right.VMId
| where OSType in ('windows')
| extend Serverid = id, ProvisionState = pack(ExtensionName, Status)
| summarize ExtProvision = make_bag(ProvisionState) by Serverid, OSType, ServerStatus
| extend status = parse_json(ExtProvision)['{WinExtension1:value}']
| project status
| summarize count() by tostring(status)
content.title: {WinExtension1:value}

content.query:
resources
| where type in ({WinExtMachineType})
| extend JoinID = toupper(id), OSType = iff(type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', tostring(properties.osType), tolower(tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType))), ServerStatus = iff(type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', tostring(properties.status), tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.displayStatus))
| where ServerStatus in ({WinExtServerStatus})
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions' or type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/extensions'
    | where properties.type in ('{WinExtension2:value}')
    | extend VMId = toupper(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions'))), ExtensionName = tostring(properties.type), Status = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
) on $left.JoinID == $right.VMId
| where OSType in ('windows')
| extend Serverid = id, ProvisionState = pack(ExtensionName, Status)
| summarize ExtProvision = make_bag(ProvisionState) by Serverid, OSType, ServerStatus
| extend status = parse_json(ExtProvision)['{WinExtension2:value}']
| project status
| summarize count() by tostring(status)
content.title: {WinExtension2:value}

content.query:
resources
| where type in ({WinExtMachineType})
| extend JoinID = toupper(id), OSType = iff(type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', tostring(properties.osType), tolower(tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType))), ServerStatus = iff(type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', tostring(properties.status), tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.displayStatus))
| where ServerStatus in ({WinExtServerStatus})
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions' or type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/extensions'
    | where properties.type in ('{WinExtension3:value}')
    | extend VMId = toupper(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions'))), ExtensionName = tostring(properties.type), Status = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
) on $left.JoinID == $right.VMId
| where OSType in ('windows')
| extend Serverid = id, ProvisionState = pack(ExtensionName, Status)
| summarize ExtProvision = make_bag(ProvisionState) by Serverid, OSType, ServerStatus
| extend status = parse_json(ExtProvision)['{WinExtension3:value}']
| project status
| summarize count() by tostring(status)
content.title: {WinExtension3:value}

content.query:
resources
| where type in ({WinExtMachineType})
| extend JoinID = toupper(id), OSType = iff(type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', tostring(properties.osType), tolower(tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType))), ServerStatus = iff(type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', tostring(properties.status), tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.displayStatus))
| where ServerStatus in ({WinExtServerStatus})
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions' or type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/extensions'
    | where properties.type in ('{WinExtension4:value}')
    | extend VMId = toupper(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions'))), ExtensionName = tostring(properties.type), Status = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
) on $left.JoinID == $right.VMId
| where OSType in ('windows')
| extend Serverid = id, ProvisionState = pack(ExtensionName, Status)
| summarize ExtProvision = make_bag(ProvisionState) by Serverid, OSType, ServerStatus
| extend status = parse_json(ExtProvision)['{WinExtension4:value}']
| project status
| summarize count() by tostring(status)
content.title: {WinExtension4:value}

content.query:
resources
| where type in ({WinExtMachineType})
| extend JoinID = toupper(id),
    OSName = iff(type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', tostring(properties.osProfile.computerName), tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.computerName)),
    OSType = iff(type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', tostring(properties.osName), tolower(tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType))),
    OSsku = iff(type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', tostring(properties.osSku), tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.osName)),
    ServerStatus = iff(type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', tostring(properties.status), tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.displayStatus))
| where ServerStatus in ({WinExtServerStatus})
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions' or type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/extensions'
    | where properties.type in ('{WinExtension1:value}','{WinExtension2:value}','{WinExtension3:value}','{WinExtension4:value}')
    | extend VMId = toupper(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions'))),
        ExtensionName = tostring(properties.type),
        Version = iff(type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions', tostring(properties.instanceView.typeHandlerVersion), tostring(properties.typeHandlerVersion)),
        Status = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
) on $left.JoinID == $right.VMId
| where OSType contains 'windows' or OSsku contains 'Windows'
| extend ServerName = id, VersionNumber = pack(ExtensionName, Version), ProvisionState = pack(ExtensionName, Status)
| summarize ExtVersions = make_bag(VersionNumber), ExtProvision = make_bag(ProvisionState) by ServerName, OSType, OSName, OSsku, ServerStatus
| extend Extension1Version = tostring(parse_json(ExtVersions)['{WinExtension1:value}']),
    ['1-{WinExtension1:value}'] = iff(isnotnull(parse_json(ExtProvision)['{WinExtension1:value}']), parse_json(ExtProvision)['{WinExtension1:value}'], ''),
    Extension2Version = tostring(parse_json(ExtVersions)['{WinExtension2:value}']),
    ['2-{WinExtension2:value}'] = iff(isnotnull(parse_json(ExtProvision)['{WinExtension2:value}']), parse_json(ExtProvision)['{WinExtension2:value}'], ''),
    Extension3Version = tostring(parse_json(ExtVersions)['{WinExtension3:value}']),
    ['3-{WinExtension3:value}'] = iff(isnotnull(parse_json(ExtProvision)['{WinExtension3:value}']), parse_json(ExtProvision)['{WinExtension3:value}'], ''),
    Extension4Version = tostring(parse_json(ExtVersions)['{WinExtension4:value}']),
    ['4-{WinExtension4:value}'] = iff(isnotnull(parse_json(ExtProvision)['{WinExtension4:value}']), parse_json(ExtProvision)['{WinExtension4:value}'], '')
| project ServerName, OSsku, ServerStatus, OSType, ['1-{WinExtension1:value}'], Extension1Version, ['2-{WinExtension2:value}'], Extension2Version, ['3-{WinExtension3:value}'], Extension3Version, ['4-{WinExtension4:value}'], Extension4Version
| sort by Extension1Version
content.title: Windows Extension Details
